description: Stage 2 curated drafting corpus for converting the approved architecture into the exact drop-in packet. The approved stage-1 review bundle is added dynamically. This stage intentionally narrows context to the implementation surfaces most likely to change: runtime orchestration, manifest and review-bundle loading, artifact persistence, monitoring and recovery behavior, the current self-improvement pack surfaces that shape drafting, and the most relevant executable-spec tests. Broad stage-1-only background, non-core eval harness context, and pack-self tests are removed.

primary_job_inputs.notes: authoritative task statement and supervisory-lane requirements
authoritative operator workflow, review discipline, and failure-recovery requirements
authoritative final output contract for the drop-in-ready package

attached_repository_files.notes: top-level operating contract for the standalone runner repository
operator runbook for run, review, resume, and refresh behavior
generic CLI entrypoint for run, resume, and refresh
current engine implementation surfaces needed for drafting; package overview and built-in sidecar prompt files are excluded at this stage
review-bundle hashing, validation, and handoff-expansion coverage
authoritative coverage for failure recovery, resume, refresh, sidecar cleanup, and approved progression from failed stages with real artifacts
current self-improvement pack surfaces needed for drafting, excluding the stage-1-specific scaffold files and corpus already provided through higher-authority channels

reference_context.notes: example reviewed workflow stage 1 input manifest
example reviewed workflow stage 2 input manifest
example reviewed workflow stage 3 input manifest
